content.text:
*pause, breath held slightly*

I think it would mean... I was ordinary? Like, that sounds so strange to say. But I think part of me has been -- the strong one is how I matter in this family. It's how I'm needed. And if I'm not that...

*stops*

I don't know what I am to them.

*small laugh, a little uncomfortable*

That's a bigger thing than I came in here to talk about. I came in here to figure out what to say to my sister. Like, literally what words to use.
